name: slime-wc
description: Slime WC — retro slime soccer in a modern kit, tied to the 2026 World Cup.

scripts.check: node --check game.js && node --check leaderboard.js && node --check service-worker.js && node --check volley/game.js && node --check volley/leaderboard.js && node --check volley/service-worker.js && npm run lint
scripts.test:browser: node smoketest.mjs && node goaltest.mjs && node wktest.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run test:logic
scripts.lint: eslint game.js leaderboard.js service-worker.js volley/game.js volley/leaderboard.js volley/service-worker.js
